prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约22793→25895→25677→31850→23383名。2024年位次大幅后移至31850名（可能受当年专业结构或考生偏好波动影响），2025年 显著回升至23383名，近两年波动幅度约8500名，显示该校在河北省物理类考生中的竞争热度存在较大弹性；2021–2025年物理类本省计划分别为235→235→239→23 8→233人，整体稳定在235人左右；2026年计划增至245人，较2025年扩招约5.2%，扩招幅度明显，理论上会降低竞争门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第82→2022年第83→2023年第83→2024年第83→2025年第79→2026年第80名，排名稳定在80名左右，属于中上水平211高校；20 23年声誉偏负面（副校长实名举报校长事件），2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），2026年声誉偏负面（学术不端事件被通报）；抖音热度排名第77、评价为一般，短视 频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A级，是该校唯一A-及以上学科；车辆工程、机械 工程、电气工程等工科专业虽未获A级评级，但在行业内认可度较高，与招生专业中的车辆工程、机械类、电气工程及其自动化等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，与合肥工业大学以工科见长的定位高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生；2026年河北省物理类考生估算约36 .5万人，较2025年（36.3万人）小幅增加约0.5%，竞争略有加剧；省控线（本科批）2021年412→2022年430→2023年439→2024年448→2025年459分，呈逐年上升趋势，反映整体竞争 强度提升；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，在河北省无本地招生倾斜；该校在河北省物理类招生人数约占其全国总招生计划的较小比例，属跨省招生，无显著 地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升至23383名的基准、2026年扩招约5.2%带来的竞争缓解效应、声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度、以及物理类考生小幅增加 和专业热度偏热对竞争的双向作用，预计2026年物理类最低位次约24156名，区间23656–24656名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 22793 → 25895 → 25677 → 31850 → 23383. In 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 31850 (possibly due to changes in major structure or candidate preferences that year), but rebounded notably to 23383 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 8500 rankings over the past two years, indicating considerable elasticity in competition heat for this university among Hebei Physics Category candidates. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for the Physics Category were 235 → 235 → 239 → 238 → 233, remaining stable around 235. In 2026, the plan increases to 245, an expansion of about 5.2% compared to 2025, which is significant and theoretically lowers the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 82nd in 2021 → 83rd in 2022 → 83rd in 2023 → 83rd in 2024 → 79th in 2025 → 80th in 2026, maintaining a stable position around 80th, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 universities. In 2023, its reputation was negative (due to a vice president publicly reporting the president), in 2025 it was negative (hot majors saw a sharp drop in admission scores), and in 2026 it was negative (an academic misconduct incident was reported). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of average, indicating mid-to-low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signal of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at this university. Engineering majors such as Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering, though not rated A, are highly recognized in the industry and directly correspond to enrollment majors like Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Category, and Electrical Engineering and Automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Category, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be hot/highly recommended in society, aligning well with Hefei University of Technology's engineering-focused positioning, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Hebei is about 365,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (363,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been rising year by year: 412 in 2021 → 430 in 2022 → 439 in 2023 → 448 in 2024 → 459 in 2025, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, and has no local enrollment preference in Hebei. The number of Physics Category students enrolled in Hebei accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total national enrollment, making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 23383, the competition relief effect from the 2025 expansion of about 5.2%, the negative reputation potentially slightly suppressing application heat, and the bidirectional effects of a slight increase in Physics Category candidates and hot majors on competition, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 24156, with a range of 23656–24656.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 23656–24656, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., close to 23000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 hot engineering majors like the Integrated Circuit Innovation Experimental Class and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 24000), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Manufacturing, Mechanical Design, and Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 24600), use Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also paying attention to the admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3656 → 4247 → 4183 → 3882 → 4170. Overall, they fluctuated within the range of 3600–4300. After the ranking shifted to 4247 in 2022, it stabilized between 3882 and 4183 from 2023 to 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 300 in the past three years, showing a relatively stable trend. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 9 → 12 → 11 → 13 → 12, fluctuating slightly between 9 and 13. In 2026, the plan decreases to 10, a reduction of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction and theoretically will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 80th, a stable position, placing it among mid-to-high-level 211 universities. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to the vice president reporting the president incident), in 2025 it was somewhat negative (due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and in 2026 it remains somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranks 77th, with a rating of average, and there has been no significant increase in application interest. Management Science and Engineering is rated A-level, but this discipline mainly targets Physics Category students. The History Category enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, English) have no directly corresponding A- or above disciplines, so their disciplinary appeal is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province is about 245,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2024 (244,000), leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 454 in 2021 → 443 in 2022 → 430 in 2023 → 449 in 2024 → 477 in 2025, with a significant rise in 2025, reflecting increased competition intensity. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province and has no local enrollment preference in Hebei Province. The number of History Category enrollments is very small (about 10), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 4170 in 2025, the intensified competition effect due to a 16.7% enrollment reduction in 2026, the slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress application interest, and the slight increase in History Category examinees affecting competition, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3783, with a range of 3283–4283.
